cards.en: DURING — during the meeting / during summer
FOR — for 3 hours / for two years / for a long time

cards.ru: с тех пор как (и до сих пор)
cards.en: SINCE — since Monday / since 2010 / since I was a child
BY — by Friday / by 6 o'clock / by the end of the day
UNTIL / TILL — until midnight / till Monday
FROM … TO … — from 9 to 5 / from Monday to Friday
AGO — 3 days ago / two years ago / a moment ago
WITHIN — within a week / within 24 hours
BEFORE / AFTER — before lunch / after the meeting
SHORTLY BEFORE — shortly before the exam
